exercises.name: Treadmill Fast Walking
exercises.instructions: Walk at brisk pace (3.5-4.0 mph) with slight incline to warm up entire body

exercises.name: Arm Circles
exercises.instructions: Large circles forward and backward, 30 seconds each direction

exercises.name: Chest Opener Stretch
exercises.instructions: Arms extended behind, squeeze shoulder blades, hold for deep chest stretch

exercises.name: Tricep Stretch
exercises.instructions: Reach arm overhead, bend elbow, pull with other hand

exercises.name: Shoulder Mobility
exercises.instructions: Band pull-aparts and dislocations to prep shoulders for pressing

exercises.name: Flat Barbell Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Retract shoulders, arch back, lower to chest, drive explosively to lockout

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.instructions: 45-degree incline, press dumbbells up and together, squeeze at top

exercises.name: Cable Flyes
exercises.instructions: Slight bend in elbows, bring handles together, squeeze chest hard

exercises.name: Dips (Chest Variation)
exercises.instructions: Lean forward, elbows out, descend until stretch in chest, press up powerfully

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Hands shoulder-width, lower bar to sternum, press with triceps focus

exercises.name: Overhead Dumbbell Extension
exercises.instructions: Seated, one heavy dumbbell overhead, lower behind head, extend fully up

exercises.name: Cable Rope Pushdown
exercises.instructions: Push rope down until arms fully extend, flare rope at bottom for peak contraction

exercises.name: Diamond Push-Ups
exercises.instructions: Hands together forming diamond, lower chest to hands, push to lockout

exercises.name: Cable Crunches
exercises.instructions: Kneel, rope behind neck, crunch down explosively, squeeze abs hard, slow return

exercises.name: StairMaster Steady-State
exercises.instructions: Maintain challenging pace for full 45 minutes, no leaning on rails

exercises.name: Full Body Stretch & Foam Roll
exercises.instructions: Roll chest, triceps, shoulders; stretch pecs, triceps, and hip flexors 30s each
